output: Completed batch 10. Migrated the seven planned editor-context consumers from the deprecated merged hook to `useTimelineEditorData()` and/or `useTimelineEditorOps()`: `TimelineEditor`, `PropertiesPanel`, `PreviewPanel`, `AssetPanel`, `CompactPreview`, `useSelectedMediaClips`, and `VideoEditorShell`. During verification, fixed a small helper regression in `TimelineEditor` so `resolveSelectedGenerationIdsForShotCreation` accepts the existing test `registry` shape as well as the optimized asset-generation map path used by the component. Verification: grep shows none of the seven target consumers still import `useTimelineEditorContext`, and the full video-editor Vitest module passed with 24 test files and 89 tests. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/take-the-video-editor-20260406-0351/execution_batch_10.json`.
